title: EventPropertyEncrypted
description: An encrypted event property schema entry. Used in eventProperties when encryption is active (env != prod and publicEncryptionKey provided). List-type properties are omitted entirely.

propertyName.description: The name of the event property.

propertyType.description: The classified type of the property value. List types are omitted when encryption is active.

encryptedPropertyValue.description: Base64-encoded ECIES-encrypted property value. Format: 0x00 version byte + 65-byte uncompressed ephemeral P-256 pubkey + 16-byte AES-256-GCM IV + 16-byte GCM auth tag + ciphertext.

children.description: Present when propertyType is 'object'. Each element is a SchemaEntry.
